2605.05702.title: Knowledge-Graph Paths as Intermediate Supervision for Self-Evolving Search Agents
2605.05702.paper_summary: Self-evolving search agents reduce reliance on human-written training questions by generating and solving their own search tasks. We build on Search Self-Play (SSP), a representative Proposer and Solver framework in which questions are generated and answered via multi-step search and reasoning. In practice, however, SSP faces two bottlenecks: the Proposer constructs questions from isolated answer entities without relational context, yielding many invalid or unverifiable questions in early self-play training, while the Solver receives only a binary outcome reward that discards useful signal from partially on-track search trajectories. We address both bottlenecks by reusing knowledge-graph paths as construction-derived intermediate supervision for both question construction and reward shaping. First, we ground question construction in LLM-guided knowledge-graph subgraphs, providing relational context for the Proposer. Second, we observe that constructing and solving a multi-hop question can involve overlapping intermediate entities: the factual bridges used to formulate the question may provide approximate waypoints for answering it. Exploiting this overlap, we introduce Waypoint Coverage Reward (WCR), which grants graded partial credit to incorrect Solver trajectories according to their coverage of entities on the construction path, while preserving full reward for correct answers. Across seven QA benchmarks and nine model configurations, our approach improves the average score over standard SSP in all configurations, including notable gains on multi-hop QA tasks. These results suggest that knowledge-graph paths can be reused as lightweight intermediate supervision, providing both relational guidance and process feedback without additional task-specific human annotations or manually labeled process steps.
2605.05702.paper_summary_zh: 自我演化的搜索代理減少了對人類編寫的訓練問題的依賴，通過生成和解決自己的搜索任務。我們基於搜索自我遊戲（SSP），這是一個具有代表性的提議者和解決者框架，其中問題通過多步搜索和推理生成和回答。然而，在實踐中，SSP面臨兩個瓶頸：提議者從孤立的答案實體構建問題，缺乏關聯上下文，導致在早期自我遊戲訓練中產生許多無效或不可驗證的問題，而解決者僅獲得二元結果獎勵，這丟棄了部分在軌搜索軌跡中的有用信號。我們通過重用知識圖譜路徑作為構建衍生的中間監督來解決這兩個瓶頸，適用於問題構建和獎勵塑造。首先，我們將問題構建基於LLM引導的知識圖譜子圖，為提議者提供關聯上下文。其次，我們觀察到構建和解決多跳問題可能涉及重疊的中間實體：用於形成問題的事實橋樑可能為回答問題提供近似的途徑點。利用這種重疊，我們引入了途徑點覆蓋獎勵（WCR），根據解決者在構建路徑上的實體覆蓋情況，對不正確的解決者軌跡給予分級部分信用，同時對正確答案保留全額獎勵。在七個QA基準和九個模型配置中，我們的方法在所有配置中提高了標準SSP的平均分數，包括在多跳QA任務上顯著的增益。這些結果表明，知識圖譜路徑可以作為輕量級中間監督重用，提供關聯指導和過程反饋，而無需額外的任務特定人類註釋或手動標記的過程步驟。
2605.05702.author: Huyu Wu et.al.
2605.05702.authors: Huyu Wu, Jun Liu, Xiaochi Wei, Yan Gao, Yi Wu, Yao Hu
